body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-9093", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [], "description": "In Casdoor versions 2.362.0 and earlier, the SAML service provider implementation does not validate the AudienceRestriction element in SAML assertions. The buildSp function in object/saml_sp.go never sets AudienceURI on the gosaml2 SAMLServiceProvider struct and never inspects WarningInfo.NotInAudience. This allows assertions issued for other service providers to be accepted by Casdoor.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00365, "percentile": 0.2851}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3w4h-g9f5-j84p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T18:37:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3w4h-g9f5-j84p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3w4h-g9f5-j84p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9093"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T17:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-28T18:30:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9093", "https://kb.cert.org/vuls/id/780781", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3w4h-g9f5-j84p"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/casdoor/casdoor", "summary": "Casdoor  does not validate the AudienceRestriction element in SAML assertions", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T18:37:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3w4h-g9f5-j84p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/casdoor/casdoor"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.1000.1-0.20260321120606-239e8bd69487"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
